description: A fast and accurate short-read alignment tool that allows for mismatches and gaps. Alignments are output in a SAM format file, which provides Phred-scale quality scores for each alignment.  Uses BWA 0.7.4 aln and samse/sampe.
author: Heng Li, Broad Institute
plan:
## BWA.aln GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
BWA.aln is a GenePattern module that A fast and accurate short-read alignment tool that allows for mismatches and gaps. Alignments are output in a SAM format file, which provides Phred-scale quality scores for each alignment.  Uses BWA 0.7.4 aln and samse/sampe.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 24 parameters:
- Required: BWA.index, reads.pair.1, iterative.search, Illumina.1.3.format, output.prefix
- Optional: reads.pair.2, bam.mapping, max.edit.distance, max.num.gap, max.gap.extension, max.deletion.length, max.indel.length, seed.length, max.seed.edit.distance, mismatch.penalty, gap.open.penalty, gap.extension.penalty, max.best.hits, trim.reads, barcode.length, max.insert.size, max.occurrences, max.alignments, max.dc.alignments

### 3. Command Line
```
perl /opt/genepatt/BWA.aln/src/bwa_aln_wrapper.pl -bwa <BWA_0.7.4>/bwa -libdir <libdir> -w1 <BWA.index> -p1 <reads.pair.1> -p2 <reads.pair.2> -bm <bam.mapping> -n1 <max.edit.distance> -g <max.num.gap> <max.gap.extension> -d <max.deletion.length> -idl <max.indel.length> -l <seed.length> -k <max.seed.edit.distance> -m <mismatch.penalty>  -o1 <gap.open.penalty> -E <gap.extension.penalty> -r <max.best.hits> -n2 <iterative.search> -q <trim.reads> -ilmn <Illumina.1.3.format> -B <barcode.length> -a <max.insert.size> -u <max.occurrences> -x1 <max.alignments> -x2 <max.dc.alignments> -t 4 -o2 <output.prefix>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/bwa_modules\:v0.2

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: BWA.index
parameters.description: A zip file or directory containing BWA index files.

parameters.name: reads.pair.1
parameters.description: Single-end or first paired-end reads file in FASTA, FASTQ, or BAM format.  For paired-end data, this should be the forward ("*_1" or "left") input file.  Note\: the FASTA or FASTQ can be gzipped.

parameters.name: reads.pair.2
parameters.description: The reverse ("*_2" or "right") input file for paired-end reads in FASTA, FASTQ, or BAM format. Note\: the FASTA or FASTQ can be gzipped.

parameters.name: bam.mapping
parameters.description: Specifies how to map BAM input. This is only required if input file is in BAM format.

parameters.name: max.edit.distance
parameters.description: The max edit distance. This specifies a threshold of the maximum number of deletions, insertions, and substitutions needed to transform the reference sequence into the read sequence.

parameters.name: max.num.gap
parameters.description: Maximum number of gap opens. This specifies a threshold of the maximum number of gaps that can be initiated to match a given read to the reference.

parameters.name: max.gap.extension
parameters.description: Maximum number of gap extensions. This specifies a threshold of the maximum number of bases by which gaps in a read can be extended.

parameters.name: max.deletion.length
parameters.description: Disallow a long deletion within this many bp of the 3' end.

parameters.name: max.indel.length
parameters.description: Disallow an indel within this many bp of the ends

parameters.name: seed.length
parameters.description: The set of bases determined by this option in the high-quality (left) end of the read is the seed.

parameters.name: max.seed.edit.distance
parameters.description: Maximum edit distance in the seed; that is, the maximum number of changes required to transform the reference sequence of the seed into the read sequence of the seed.

parameters.name: mismatch.penalty
parameters.description: Mismatch penalty

parameters.name: gap.open.penalty
parameters.description: Gap open penalty.  The gap open penalty is the score taken away for the initiation of the gap in sequence. To make the match more significant you can try to make the gap penalty larger.

parameters.name: gap.extension.penalty
parameters.description: Gap extension penalty.  The gap extension penalty is added to the standard gap penalty for each base or residue in the gap.  To reduce long gaps, increase the extension gap penalty.

parameters.name: max.best.hits
parameters.description: Proceed with suboptimal alignments if there are no more than this many equally best hits. This option only affects paired-end mapping.

parameters.name: iterative.search
parameters.description: Whether to disable iterative search

parameters.name: trim.reads
parameters.description: Specifies a quality threshold for read trimming

parameters.name: Illumina.1.3.format
parameters.description: The input is in the Illumina 1.3+ read format

parameters.name: barcode.length
parameters.description: Length of barcode starting from the 5' end

parameters.name: max.insert.size
parameters.description: Specifies the maximum insert size for a read pair to be considered to be mapped properly

parameters.name: max.occurrences
parameters.description: Specifies the maximum occurrences of a read for pairing

parameters.name: max.alignments
parameters.description: Maximum number of alignments to output in the XA tag for reads paired properly

parameters.name: max.dc.alignments
parameters.description: Maximum number of alignments to output in the XA tag for disconcordant read pairs (excluding singletons)

parameters.name: output.prefix
parameters.description: Prefix to use for output file name
